test-case.name: AuditArc_BuildsInFlowOrAudit_WithFullProvenanceSpine
test-case.output: [stage] RESET_DEMO → banking READY

test-case.name: AuditArc_HappyPath_AllLinksVerified
test-case.output: [stage] RESET_DEMO → banking READY

test-case.name: AuditArc_IsOnlyOne_AndIdempotentAcrossReEntry
test-case.output: [stage] RESET_DEMO → banking READY

test-case.name: CouncilState_HasExactlyOneDominantVoice
test-case.output: [stage] RESET_DEMO → banking READY

test-case.name: CouncilVoices_EachGetAUniqueFlatLabel
test-case.output: [stage] RESET_DEMO → banking READY

test-case.name: HeadDirectedFocus_ExistsAndNeverApproves
test-case.output: [stage] RESET_DEMO → banking READY

test-case.name: Reset_HidesAuditArc_AndReturnsToBankingReady
test-case.output: [stage] RESET_DEMO → banking READY [stage] RESET_DEMO → banking READY

test-case.name: LoadsEachStoryAndSpawnsNodes
test-case.output: ShadowGuidedStoryPlayer: no snapshots assigned FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Audit chain: integrity, not correctness — A decision seals into a hash-chained, signed provenance chain. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED DIGITAL_SIGNATURE: VERIFIED EXTERNAL_ANCHOR: NOT_PRESENT HASH_CHAIN: VERIFIED PROFILE: VERIFIED RECORD_INTEGRITY: VERIFIED SOURCE_RESOLUTION: NOT_PRESENT FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Reason-code attestation binding — Two reason codes are selected, each bound to verified evidence. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED CLAIM_EVIDENCE_BINDING: VERIFIED DICTIONARY_HASH: VERIFIED DICTIONARY_VERSION: VERIFIED DIGITAL_SIGNATURE: VERIFIED LEGAL_FAIRNESS_REVIEW: REQUIRES_HUMAN_REVIEW POLICY_ADEQUACY: NOT_EVALUATED RECORD_INTEGRITY: VERIFIED FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Persona deliberation → evidence-grounded synthesis — Five analytical perspectives read the same shared evidence. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED CLAIM_EVIDENCE_BINDING: VERIFIED HUMAN_APPROVAL: NOT_PRESENT LEGAL_FAIRNESS_REVIEW: REQUIRES_HUMAN_REVIEW PERSONA_OUTPUT_INTEGRITY: VERIFIED SOURCE_RESOLUTION: VERIFIED SYNTHESIS_PROVENANCE: VERIFIED

test-case.name: StepNextBackRestart_StayInBounds
test-case.output: ShadowGuidedStoryPlayer: no snapshots assigned FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Audit chain: integrity, not correctness — A decision seals into a hash-chained, signed provenance chain. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED DIGITAL_SIGNATURE: VERIFIED EXTERNAL_ANCHOR: NOT_PRESENT HASH_CHAIN: VERIFIED PROFILE: VERIFIED RECORD_INTEGRITY: VERIFIED SOURCE_RESOLUTION: NOT_PRESENT FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Audit chain: integrity, not correctness — Each link derives from the previous one, source through audit record. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED DIGITAL_SIGNATURE: VERIFIED EXTERNAL_ANCHOR: NOT_PRESENT HASH_CHAIN: VERIFIED PROFILE: VERIFIED RECORD_INTEGRITY: VERIFIED SOURCE_RESOLUTION: NOT_PRESENT FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Audit chain: integrity, not correctness — The recommendation is sealed by an Ed25519 signature into the audit record. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED DIGITAL_SIGNATURE: VERIFIED EXTERNAL_ANCHOR: NOT_PRESENT HASH_CHAIN: VERIFIED PROFILE: VERIFIED RECORD_INTEGRITY: VERIFIED SOURCE_RESOLUTION: NOT_PRESENT FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Audit chain: integrity, not correctness — Alter the council claim at sequence 3 and its verification fails first. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED DIGITAL_SIGNATURE: FAILED EXTERNAL_ANCHOR: NOT_PRESENT HASH_CHAIN: FAILED PROFILE: VERIFIED RECORD_INTEGRITY: FAILED SOURCE_RESOLUTION: NOT_PRESENT FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Audit chain: integrity, not correctness — Every downstream link is frozen as affected — a green chain would have proved only that the record was unaltered. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED DIGITAL_SIGNATURE: FAILED EXTERNAL_ANCHOR: NOT_PRESENT HASH_CHAIN: FAILED PROFILE: VERIFIED RECORD_INTEGRITY: FAILED SOURCE_RESOLUTION: NOT_PRESENT FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Audit chain: integrity, not correctness — Integrity is judged; analytical correctness is NOT evaluated by the chain. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED DIGITAL_SIGNATURE: VERIFIED EXTERNAL_ANCHOR: NOT_PRESENT HASH_CHAIN: VERIFIED PROFILE: VERIFIED RECORD_INTEGRITY: VERIFIED SOURCE_RESOLUTION: NOT_PRESENT FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Audit chain: integrity, not correctness — Integrity is judged; analytical correctness is NOT evaluated by the chain. test-case.name: DecisionPanelPopulatesInView

failure.message: Expected: not null But was: null

test-case.output: [ShadowLens] button → ANALYZE (state was Ready)

test-case.name: Reset_ReturnsToReadyAndUnsigned
test-case.label: Error

failure.message: System.NullReferenceException : Object reference not set to an instance of an object

test-case.output: [ShadowLens] button → ANALYZE (state was Ready) [ShadowLens] button → VERIFY (state was Analyzed) [ShadowLens] button → RESET (state was Verified)

test-case.name: ResetReturnsToReady
test-case.output: [ShadowLens] button → ANALYZE (state was Ready) [ShadowLens] button → RESET (state was Analyzed)

test-case.name: ShowAudit_ArcInFrustum
test-case.output: [ShadowLens] button → SHOW_AUDIT (state was Ready) [ShadowLens] button → ANALYZE (state was Ready) [ShadowLens] SHOW_AUDIT → nodes=7 rootActive=True inFrustum=True

test-case.name: ShowAudit_CreatesVisibleNodes
test-case.output: [ShadowLens] button → SHOW_AUDIT (state was Ready) [ShadowLens] button → ANALYZE (state was Ready) [ShadowLens] SHOW_AUDIT → nodes=7 rootActive=True inFrustum=True

test-case.name: ShowSource_CreatesVisibleOverlay

failure.message: Expected string length 11 but was 7. Strings differ at index 0. Expected: "SHOW_SOURCE" But was: "ANALYZE" -----------^

test-case.output: [ShadowLens] button → SHOW_SOURCE (state was Ready) [ShadowLens] button → ANALYZE (state was Ready) [ShadowLens] SHOW_SOURCE → overlay active=True inFrustum=True

test-case.name: ShowSource_OverlayInFrustum
test-case.output: [ShadowLens] button → SHOW_SOURCE (state was Ready) [ShadowLens] button → ANALYZE (state was Ready) [ShadowLens] SHOW_SOURCE → overlay active=True inFrustum=True

test-case.name: Tamper_ChangesVerifiedToTampered
test-case.output: [ShadowLens] button → ANALYZE (state was Ready) [ShadowLens] button → VERIFY (state was Analyzed) [ShadowLens] button → TAMPER (state was Verified)
